introSection: Horská Dráha (Czech for Roller Coaster) is a steel roller coaster currently owned by showman Jaroslav Štaubert. It was previously located at Lunapark in Prague, the Czech Republic, where it operated from 1973 to May 2018. The ride was subsequently dismantled. After leaving Lunapark, the coaster was purchased by Štaubert who has refurbished the ride and plans to introduce it as a travelling coaster in 2024.
fullText: Horská Dráha (Czech for Roller Coaster) is a steel roller coaster currently owned by showman Jaroslav Štaubert. It was previously located at Lunapark in Prague, the Czech Republic, where it operated from 1973 to May 2018. The ride was subsequently dismantled. After leaving Lunapark, the coaster was purchased by Štaubert who has refurbished the ride and plans to introduce it as a travelling coaster in 2024.
